title: Alligator - The Gruffalo Colouring Set, Colouring Books for Children, Colouring Pencils, Resusable Stickers, Gruffalo Child Book, Gruffalo Colouring Books, for Kids
features: ALL-INCLUSIVE SET: The Gruffalo Colouring Set showcases 8 captivating colouring sheets, 6 colouring pencils, and a bonus sheet of reusable stickers, making it a top pick among colouring books for children.

MAGICAL ADVENTURES: Tailored for fans of the Gruffalo book series, this set beautifully captures the charm of the Gruffalo and his friends, ensuring it's a must-have for young kids colouring books enthusiasts.
CREATIVE FUN: Beyond a regular colouring book, this set sparks imagination, allowing young artists to color iconic Gruffalo scenes, blending storytelling with creativity.
PORTABLE & PRACTICAL: Designed for convenience, this colouring set is compact and travel-friendly, perfect for entertainment on-the-go, holidays, or everyday enjoyment.

PERFECT GIFT: Whether for a birthday, holiday, or special occasion, The Gruffalo Colouring Set by Alligator Products Ltd. gives to enchant and inspire. It's an ideal gift choice for Gruffalo fans eager to embark on coloring adventures with their favorite characters!
